name: New Jersey National Guard Tuition Program (NJNGTP)
description: FREE tuition for up to 16 credits per semester at 29 New Jersey public institutions for National Guard members in good standing. Covers both undergraduate and graduate programs. This is a last-dollar benefit after Pell Grants and TAG, and cannot be combined with Federal Tuition Assistance.
eligibility: Active New Jersey National Guard member in good standing
Enrolled at participating New Jersey public institution
Cannot be receiving Federal Tuition Assistance concurrently
benefit_amount: FREE tuition - 16 credits per semester at public institutions
how_to_apply: Apply through New Jersey Army National Guard education office. Must be approved before enrollment each semester.

name: Vietnam Veterans Tuition Credit Program
description: $400 per year tuition credit for eligible Vietnam-era veterans attending New Jersey institutions of higher education.
eligibility: Attending New Jersey institution of higher education
how_to_apply: Contact institution's financial aid office or New Jersey Department of Military and Veterans Affairs
source_name: New Jersey Department of Military and Veterans Affairs

name: POW/MIA Dependents Tuition Waiver
description: FREE tuition at New Jersey public colleges and universities for children of veterans who were prisoners of war or declared missing in action.
eligibility: Child of New Jersey veteran who was POW or MIA
benefit_amount: FREE tuition at NJ public institutions
how_to_apply: Apply through New Jersey Department of Military and Veterans Affairs with POW/MIA documentation
source_name: New Jersey Department of Military and Veterans Affairs

name: War Orphans Tuition Assistance
description: $500 per year for up to 4 years for children of veterans who died or became totally disabled while serving during wartime or peacetime service.
eligibility: Child of New Jersey veteran who died or became totally disabled during service
benefit_amount: $500 per year for up to 4 years ($2,000 total)
how_to_apply: Apply through New Jersey Department of Military and Veterans Affairs
source_name: New Jersey Department of Military and Veterans Affairs

name: 100% Disabled Veterans Property Tax Exemption
description: 100% property tax exemption for veterans who are 100% permanently and totally disabled (P&T) as certified by the VA. Exemption applies to primary residence.
eligibility: 100% permanent and total VA disability rating
benefit_amount: 100% property tax exemption on primary residence
how_to_apply: File annually with local tax assessor with VA certification letter

name: Disabled Veterans Property Tax Deduction
description: Proportional property tax exemption based on disability rating (30-90%). Veterans with service-connected disabilities receive deductions up to $10,000 in assessed property value.
eligibility: Service-connected disability rating of 30% or higher
benefit_amount: Proportional deduction based on disability rating - up to $10,000 assessed value
how_to_apply: Apply annually with local tax assessor showing VA disability rating

name: Standard Veterans Property Tax Deduction
description: $250 annual property tax deduction available to ALL honorably discharged veterans who are New Jersey residents.
how_to_apply: File with local tax assessor with DD-214

name: Veterans Income Tax Exemption
description: Income tax exemption for veterans ranging from $3,000 to $6,000 based on disability rating and other qualifying factors.
how_to_apply: Claim on New Jersey income tax return with supporting documentation

name: Military Retirement Pay Tax Exemption
description: Military retirement pay is fully exempt from New Jersey state income tax for all military retirees.
benefit_amount: 100% exemption on all military retirement income
how_to_apply: Exclude military retirement from New Jersey tax return

name: Veterans Absolute Employment Preference
description: Absolute preference in hiring for New Jersey state government positions for qualified veterans. Veterans receive priority consideration over non-veterans with equal qualifications.
benefit_amount: Absolute hiring preference for state positions
how_to_apply: Indicate veteran status on state job applications and provide DD-214

name: Free State Parks Admission
description: Free admission to New Jersey state parks for disabled veterans with valid veteran identification.
eligibility: Valid veteran ID or disability documentation
benefit_amount: Free admission to all NJ state parks
how_to_apply: Present veteran ID and disability documentation at park entrance
source_name: New Jersey Department of Environmental Protection

name: Free Private Beach Access for Disabled Veterans
description: Free access to certain private beaches in New Jersey for disabled veterans during summer season.
benefit_amount: Free beach access at participating locations
how_to_apply: Check with individual municipalities for participating beaches and required documentation
source_name: New Jersey Department of Military and Veterans Affairs

name: Disabled Veterans Hunting and Fishing License Benefits
description: Reduced-fee or free hunting and fishing licenses for disabled veterans based on disability rating.
benefit_amount: Reduced fees or free licenses based on disability rating
how_to_apply: Apply through New Jersey Fish and Wildlife with VA disability documentation
